overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a rural countryside at sunset. The character travels along dirt paths and marshy grassland past wooden fences and a thatched-roof hut, with a dramatic red and purple sky as the sun sets on the horizon.

approaching the thatched wooden hut on the left side of the path

rustic wooden post fence lining the path
calm water reflecting the sunset sky
deciduous trees with orange and red autumn foliage
unpaved dirt trail with gravel and patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking on wooden bridge planks over marsh water, transitioning onto a dirt path lined with wooden fences. A traditional thatched-roof wooden hut becomes visible in the distance on the left as the character approaches through the autumn countryside.

agents.ego_description: continuing past the wooden hut through grassy areas and crossing small wooden bridges over marsh water

grassy wetland area with patches of standing water

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes the wooden hut on the left and continues through transitioning terrain where the dirt path becomes grassy marshland. The ground grows wetter with visible water reflections, and orange wildflowers appear near the wooden fences lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: marshy grassland with tall vegetation facing the setting sun

events.description: sun becomes prominently visible on horizon, sky shifts to deep red and orange
stone ruins become visible in the distance on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through tall marsh grass toward the dramatic sunset on the horizon

entered.detail: large sun sitting on the horizon casting intense orange and red light
tall marsh grass and reeds growing along the path
ancient stone wall ruins visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens into dense marshland with tall grass as the setting sun becomes prominently visible on the horizon, bathing the scene in deep red light. Ancient stone ruins appear in the distance on the right as the character continues through the wetland path.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown path approaching ancient stone ruins

events.description: approaching stone wall ruins on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching stone ruins while walking through tall grass as darkness falls

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the ancient stone ruins that now dominate the right side of the frame, walking through dense tall grass as the sun continues to set. The stone walls become more detailed and prominent as the character draws closer to the ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural autumn countryside that gradually transforms into a deep red, marshy wetland dominated by ancient ruins. It begins with Geralt crossing wooden bridge planks over marsh water before transitioning onto a dirt path lined with wooden fences and a distant thatched-roof hut. As he passes the hut, the terrain shifts from dry earth to wet, grassy marshland where orange wildflowers bloom and water reflections shimmer on the ground. The scene then opens into a vast expanse of tall grass as the setting sun emerges on the horizon, bathing the landscape in deep red light and revealing stone ruins in the distance. Finally, the camera draws closer to these ancient stone walls, which become increasingly detailed and prominent as the character pushes through the dense wetland vegetation.
